title: Center Everything
description: Create a 2x2 grid container (300px × 300px) with 4 items (each 80px × 80px). Using grid alignment, center the items both horizontally and vertically in their cells. Then center the whole grid within the 300px container.
hint: Use `place-items: center` to center items in their cells. Use `place-content: center` to center the whole grid within the container.

solution.css:
.center-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 80px; grid-template-rows: 80px 80px; width: 300px; height: 300px; background: #f0f0f0; place-items: center; place-content: center; }
.box { background: #6c5ce7; color: white; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; }

title: Card Layout with Alignment Overrides
description: Create a 3-column card layout where cards are left-aligned by default but the center card is highlighted and centered. The cards should be top-aligned by default but the last card should stick to the bottom of its cell (cards have different heights).

starterCode.html:
Short

Small content.

Featured

This card should be centered.

Tall Card

Multiple lines of content that make this card taller than others so it sticks out.

Another

Content here.

Bottom

This one sticks to the bottom.

Last

Final card.

hint: Set `justify-items: start; align-items: start;` on the container. Override `.highlight` with `place-self: center center`. Override `.stick-bottom` with `align-self: end`.

title: Dashboard with Context-Sensitive Alignment
description: Build a 2x3 dashboard grid (3 columns × 2 rows, fixed 150px items) within a 600px × 400px container. The top row should have items distributed with space-between. Items in the bottom row should be centered. One widget (item 4) needs to stretch across 2 columns and be aligned to top-right of its cell. The entire grid should be centered in the page.

starterCode.html:
Widget 1
Widget 2
Widget 3
Widget 4 (spans 2)
Widget 5

hint: Use `justify-content: space-between` for horizontal distribution of tracks. Use `align-content: center` to vertically center rows. For the wide widget: `justify-self: end; align-self: start;`.
